title: felicia filifolia subsp. schaeferi
intro: Felicia filifolia subsp. schaeferi, also known as Felicia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Felicia filifolia subsp. schaeferi can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
